content.fact_text: Bootstrap module implementing infrastructure lifecycle management for catalog and inventory services.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes PostgreSQL pool, Redis client, and Kafka producer/consumer with circuit breakers. Manages graceful shutdown across all infrastructure components and provides a health status interface.
interfaces: getStatus(): Promise<{ status: string; components: Record<string, string> }>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a production-ready, fault-tolerant entry point for microservice bootstrapping with strict dependency management and lifecycle control.
